# Resumely App Store Screenshot Upload Manifest

Generated: 2026-06-05
Locale: English (US)

## Drag-And-Drop Folders

- iPhone 6.5-inch: `iphone-6.5-1242x2688/` — 10 opaque RGB PNGs, 1242x2688
- iPad 13-inch: `ipad-13/` — 10 opaque RGB PNGs, 2064x2752

Upload each complete folder to the matching device-size section in App Store Connect. Files are prefixed in the intended display order.

## Display Order

1. `01-tailor.png` — Your resume, tailored for any job
2. `02-blockers.png` — See exactly what's blocking you
3. `03-ai-edits.png` — AI edits that actually fit the role
4. `04-score-lift.png` — Turn a weak match into a stronger resume
5. `05-manual-edit.png` — Keep every fact under your control
6. `06-templates.png` — ATS-friendly templates that impress recruiters
7. `07-export.png` — Export a polished PDF in one tap
8. `08-expert.png` — Expert analysis for every section
9. `09-cover-letter.png` — A tailored cover letter, ready to use
10. `10-submit-package.png` — Build the complete application package

## Validation

- Both sets contain exactly 10 unique PNG files.
- iPhone images match an Apple-accepted 6.9-inch portrait size.
- iPad images match an Apple-accepted 13-inch portrait size.
- All content uses fictional product data.
- The screenshots are rendered locally by the app's marketing screenshot mode.
